data.content: Implementation review approved. Current main commit 819e6369 fixes the scanned-agent selection state by deriving selected model ids from persisted registered agent ids instead of transient scan-local state, so additional models remain addable during the same scan session and previously added models no longer block further selections. Reviewed coverage includes src/components/__tests__/settings-agents-scanned.test.ts for registered-option resolution and scanned list rendering, plus agent identity display coverage. Validation passed: bun test src/components/__tests__/settings-agents-scanned.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/agent-identity-display-parts.test.ts, bun run lint (1 pre-existing warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx, no errors), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. No knot invariants were defined, and no security or regression issues were found relative to the acceptance criteria.
